archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Modified for Premium System UI

surfaces.glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_32px_64px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
surfaces.card_safe: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all cursor-pointer rounded-xl p-6
surfaces.card_smart: bg-white/5 border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all cursor-pointer rounded-xl p-6 shadow-lg
surfaces.card_bold: bg-zinc-100 text-black hover:bg-white transition-all cursor-pointer rounded-xl p-6 font-medium shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]
surfaces.input_massive: bg-transparent border-none text-3xl md:text-5xl font-light text-white placeholder-zinc-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 w-full

layout_spacing.screen_share_container: relative w-full h-screen overflow-hidden bg-black flex items-center justify-center

landing_bg.description: Abstract dark minimal background for the landing page

instructions_to_main_agent: 0. Import Outfit, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono fonts via Google Fonts or standard imports.

1. Build the Landing Page: Use the `landing_bg` image with an overlay (`bg-black/60`). Center a massive headline 'Decide better. Not faster.' using `Outfit` font. Add a premium glassmorphic button to 'Connect Screen & Start'.
2. Screen Share Flow: Use `navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia` to prompt screen sharing. When active, display the video stream filling the background, completely replacing the landing page.
3. Context Capture: Implement a simulated loop (`setInterval`) every 5-10 seconds. Show a subtle 'capturing context...' indicator (e.g., a glowing red dot and mono text) floating in a corner.

4. Command Palette (Cmd+K): Listen for Cmd+K/Ctrl+K globally. Open a centered modal taking up generous space (`w-full max-w-3xl`). Use Shadcn Dialog heavily customized to remove standard padding and borders.
5. Command Palette UI: Apply the `glassmorphism` surface rule (`bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-white/10`). The input must be massive, borderless, taking focus immediately.

6. Reflection Layer & Memory: Once user submits a query, show a 'thinking/reflecting' state with monospace typography. Implement localStorage memory wrapper to mock the Adaptation/Memory system. Save basic queries and return them.
7. Decision Engine Options: Reveal the 3 options (Safe, Smart, Bold) using a 3-column bento grid. Each uses its respective card surface style (`card_safe`, `card_smart`, `card_bold`).
8. Output View: Selecting an option shows a detailed reasoning view inside the palette with a 'Copy to Clipboard' action.
9. CRITICAL: Include `data-testid` on ALL interactive elements (inputs, buttons, decision cards, copy buttons, screen share toggles).
10. Do not implement a chat interface. It must function like a spotlight command palette.

accessibility.contrast_check: Verified safe contrast on text against #050505 and glassmorphism backgrounds.
